caption: A man is seated in a studio with dark grey acoustic foam panels on the wall behind him. He wears a grey t-shirt, a grey baseball cap featuring a red and white logo, and large black over-ear headphones. Positioned in front of him is a professional microphone held by a black boom arm with the logo "Blue" visible. In the initial scene, the man is stationary and positioned close to the microphone. He then lifts his right arm, extending his hand in a gesturing motion away from his body. He subsequently lowers his arm and extends his hand forward toward the microphone, palm down, as if emphasizing a point or indicating a specific distance. Throughout the sequence, his facial expression remains relatively neutral as he focuses on the space in front of him.
